Pure chaos masih oke asal ad tawil keknya

Chaos menang di DR sama posse regen, caro menang burst sama low hp dmg scaling, aequor menang di tentacle versatility.

Ultra menang di strategy. literally mikir 5 turn ke depan. stack buff sblm masuk ultra turn, manfaatin gimmick buff sama debuff.
